channel.title: Cycling on Kraft Masonry
channel.description: Recent content in Cycling on Kraft Masonry

item.title: Five Days on the Oregon Coast: A Cycling Diary
item.description: The highway hugs the cliffs for miles at a stretch — no guardrail, just a white line and the Pacific dropping away below. Five days on the Oregon Coast Route taught me that the best cycling roads are the ones that make you forget you’re working.

item.title: A Weekend in the Dolomites: Notes from the Sella Ronda
item.description: The Sella Ronda is a 26-kilometre loop connecting four Dolomite passes. In summer it belongs to the hikers and the cable cars. In early autumn, if you time it right, you get two days of empty switchbacks and air that feels like it has been laundered.
